description: Detectives are building a timeline of a suspect's movements and have seized a folder of photographs from their cloud storage. The intelligence team needs the exact file hashes and creation dates of any photos containing two specific targets: the suspect's known vehicle (a yellow taxi) and a known meeting location (a bridge over water). Create an Autopsy case named 'Visual_Triage_2024' (Case Number 'INV-VIS-001') in /home/ga/Cases/ to analyze the photos located at /home/ga/evidence/suspect_photos/. Identify the specific images for the 'Yellow Taxi' and the 'Bridge', extracting the MD5 hash and EXIF 'Date Taken' (DateTimeOriginal) for each. Generate a pipe-delimited report at /home/ga/Reports/visual_targets.csv using the header TARGET|FILENAME|MD5_HASH|EXIF_DATE_TAKEN, using 'Yellow Taxi' and 'Bridge' as the target labels. Example row: Yellow Taxi|IMG_4922.jpg|d41d8cd98f00b204e9800998ecf8427e|2023-10-15 14:30:00.
